mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_response_drafts ( survey_response_draft_id, company_id, survey_instance_id, question_id, responder_user_id, answer_value ) VALUES ( #{draftId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{questionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{responderUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{answerValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE answer_value = VALUES(answer_value), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
